items.name: Open Component Model
items.description: The Open Component Model (OCM) is an open standard + reference implementation for describing software artifacts in a uniform and machine-readable way. OCM enables consistent end-to-end lifecycle management processes and a secure software supply chain.

items.name: IronCore
items.description: Next Generation Cloud Native Infrastructure as a Service and Bare Metal Automation. IronCore is a modular and scalable system designed to manage compute, networking, and storage resources efficiently.
